column1: # 10015 - Incomplete or No Cache-control Header Set
# 10016 - Web Browser XSS Protection Not Enabled

column3: X-XSS-Protection is deprecated; CSP is preferred
X-Frame-Options or CSP frame-ancestors should be set
Debug error messages should not be exposed

column1: # 10024 - Information Disclosure - Sensitive Information in URL

column3: Sensitive data should not appear in URLs

column1: # 10025 - Information Disclosure - Sensitive Information in HTTP Referrer Header

column3: Sensitive data should not appear in Referer headers
Remove TODO/FIXME comments from production code

column1: # 10036 - Server Leaks Version Information via "Server" HTTP Response Header Field

column3: Remove or obscure the Server header

column1: # 10037 - Server Leaks Information via "X-Powered-By" HTTP Response Header Field
# 10038 - Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set

column3: All cookies should have SameSite attribute
Review base64 encoded data in responses
Backup files must not be accessible
Add rel="noopener noreferrer" to external links
Oracle SQL injection must be fixed
Source code disclosure must be fixed
Format string errors must be fixed
Server-side code injection must be fixed
OS command injection must be fixed
